description.ko: 생물학적 리듬과 디지털 추상의 완벽한 조화를 나타내며, 유동적인 에너지와 자연스러운 곡선을 평온하게 시각화한 작품입니다.
description.en: A serene visualization of fluid energy and natural curves, representing the seamless harmony between biological rhythms and digital abstraction.

prompt: A high-resolution abstract 3D render of 'AURA-7' manifesting as flowing organic ribbons, iridescent liquid textures, and soft bioluminescent pulses. The composition features smooth, interconnected curves resembling silk moving underwater or translucent biological membranes. A color palette of pale emerald, pearlescent white, and soft gold. Cinematic lighting with a macro depth of field, 8k resolution, serene and harmonic atmosphere.
